calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Curtis E. Smolar, Esq. appeared with plaintiff, Shanda Nolan, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Danny Sumbler.
Default was entered against defendant on June 5, 2007. Amended defaults were entered against defendant on January 15, 2009 & April 17, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Shanda Nolan, and against the Defaulted Defendant Danny Sumbler as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,000.00.
Costs - $890.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $5,890.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
